name: Summer Concert Series: Fortunate Youth
description:
Doors open @ 3pm
Quasi Kings ~4:30pm
Fortunate Youth ~6:30pm
*set times are approximate and subject to change*
*Joe Samba was never on the bill*

One lawn chair + one refillable water bottle per guest.
3 food vendors plus PFB pizza.

Note: no dogs, no outside food/drink, no tents/canopies.

name: Newport Beer Run
location: Fort Adams State Park Newport, RI
description: A 5k open to beer lovers of all speeds followed by a 3-hour post-race beer festival highlighting the local craft brewing and food scene.

name: Brew At The Zoo
description: Tap into your wild side at Brew at the Zoo on Saturday, August 29th, an adults-only evening event, and sample hundreds of beers, hard seltzers, wines and ready-to-drink cocktails from dozens of local, regional and national breweries (see list below). Enjoy live musical entertainment, animal encounters, and more at Rhode Island’s largest outdoor beer festival.
